comment: Deterministic DU-style scorer config (08-aus-simulator.md). Lower total = lower risk. Score bands: first row whose bound the value meets applies (credit_score descending >=; ratio bands ascending <=; reserves descending >=).

messages.template: Obtain verbal verification of employment within 10 business days of note date for {borrower}.
Provide documentation supporting qualifying income of {amount} for {borrower}.
Source large deposit of {amount} dated {date} in account {account}.
Document 60-day seasoning or acceptable source for funds used to close.
Obtain updated credit report; current report expires prior to typical closing window.
Evidence of mortgage insurance coverage meeting program requirements.
Evidence of hazard insurance with acceptable coverage and mortgagee clause.
Clear title commitment showing first-lien position.
Executed gift letter and evidence of donor ability and transfer.
